🚀 v15  What's New

🔑 Groq API Key (Free at groq.com)
Free tier includes: Llama 3.3 70B, DeepSeek R1, Llama 4, QwQ 32B and more. Get your key at console.groq.com
Enter key to activate
⚠️ Running as file:// — browsers block live connection tests on local files. Your key is saved and will work when you send a message.
⚡ Auto-Fallback Key Pool — DaveAI auto-rotates when rate limited
When Key 1 is rate-limited, DaveAI instantly switches to Key 2, then Key 3, etc. Keys reset after ~60s.
🌐 OpenRouter Fallback — used when all Groq keys are exhausted
Get a free OpenRouter key at openrouter.ai — many free models available.
🔊 ElevenLabs (Premium Voice)
Enter key to test
🔍 Web Search Provider
Free key at brave.com/search/api
Get key at serper.dev — 2,500 free queries/month
Get key at tavily.com — best for agentic research

🗑️ Data Management
🗄️ Supabase — Cloud Storage

Connect Supabase to save all your chats, memories, and settings to the cloud. Works across devices. Get a free account at supabase.com

Found in your Supabase project → Settings → API
Your project's public anon key (safe to use client-side)
Enter your project URL and anon key
📋 SQL Setup

Run this SQL in your Supabase SQL Editor to create the required tables:

-- Run this in Supabase SQL Editor
-- Table: conversations
create table if not exists daveai_conversations (
  id text primary key,
  user_id text default 'default',
  title text,
  messages jsonb default '[]',
  created_at timestamptz default now(),
  updated_at timestamptz default now()
);

-- Table: memories
create table if not exists daveai_memories (
  id serial primary key,
  user_id text default 'default',
  content text,
  created_at timestamptz default now()
);

-- Table: settings
create table if not exists daveai_settings (
  user_id text primary key default 'default',
  data jsonb,
  updated_at timestamptz default now()
);

-- Enable Row Level Security (optional but recommended)
alter table daveai_conversations enable row level security;
alter table daveai_memories enable row level security;
alter table daveai_settings enable row level security;

-- Allow all operations (simple setup — add auth policies later)
create policy "Allow all" on daveai_conversations for all using (true) with check (true);
create policy "Allow all" on daveai_memories for all using (true) with check (true);
create policy "Allow all" on daveai_settings for all using (true) with check (true);

🔍 Web Search

Search the web via DuckDuckGo and get AI-summarised results with sources. No API key required.

🐙 GitHub Integration

Search GitHub repos, fetch user profiles, trending repositories, and explore code. 5,000 req/hour free.

🌤️ Weather

Real-time weather and 7-day forecast via Open-Meteo (unlimited, no API key). AI weather briefing included.

🗺️ Maps & Geocoding

Geocode addresses, reverse geocode coordinates, search places, and calculate distances via OpenStreetMap Nominatim (free, no key).

📈 Stock & Finance

Real-time stock quotes, company overviews, forex rates, and crypto prices via Alpha Vantage (25 req/day free) + AI analysis.

Include AI investment analysis
📖 Wikipedia / Knowledge

Search Wikipedia, fetch full articles, and get AI-powered knowledge summaries. Unlimited, no API key.

Full dictionary lookup: definitions, phonetics, etymology, synonyms, antonyms, and example sentences. Free Dictionary API, no key needed.

🤖 Digital Twin

Train DaveAI to mimic your writing style, decision-making patterns, and personal voice. Your twin learns from samples and generates content as if it were you.

⚡ Model Switcher

Automatically route tasks to the best free model for the job, or benchmark the same prompt across multiple models simultaneously.

⚡ Parallel Agent Processing

Run multiple AI agents simultaneously using Promise.all. Each agent handles a sub-task in parallel — dramatically faster than sequential processing.

Agent Progress
🔒 Private / Offline Mode

Run AI models completely locally using Ollama. Zero data sent to any server — 100% private, works offline. Requires Ollama installed on your machine.

🔒 Privacy Guarantee: When using Ollama, your data never leaves your device. No API calls, no logging, no cloud.
Setup Instructions
1. Install Ollama: ollama.ai
2. Run: ollama pull llama3.2
3. Start: ollama serve
4. Set endpoint below and chat!
🔎 OSINT Agent
⚠️ Ethical Use Only: This tool is for legitimate research, due diligence, and security purposes. Never use for stalking, harassment, or illegal activities.

Quick Examples
👥 Multi-Agent Crew Researcher · Writer · Critic

Three AI agents collaborate: Researcher gathers info, Writer crafts the output, Critic reviews and improves.

⚡ ReAct Agent Reason → Act → Observe

The ReAct pattern: AI Reasons about what to do, Acts to get info, then Observes the result — looping until done.

🌳 Tree-of-Thought Reasoning

Explores 3 parallel reasoning branches, evaluates each, then picks the best path to a final answer.

✅ Self-Consistency Check 3 runs

Runs your question 3 times independently, compares answers, and picks the most consistent one.

🔍 Fact-Check Agent

Claims are extracted, searched via DuckDuckGo, and verified. Each claim gets a ✅ True / ❌ False / ⚠️ Uncertain verdict.

Extracting and verifying claims…

📋 Task Queue Manager
No tasks yet. Add prompts above and run them in sequence.
🏛️ Socratic Debate Mode

AI probes your claim with Socratic questions — challenging assumptions, seeking definitions, and exposing contradictions.

🧪 Hypothesis Generator

Generate testable hypotheses from an observation or question, with how to test each one.

⚠️ Risk Analyser Agent

Analyses risks across multiple dimensions: financial, technical, operational, regulatory, reputational.

📝 Auto-Summarise Conversation

Summarise the current conversation into key points, decisions, and action items.

📺 YouTube Video Analyzer

Paste a YouTube URL to get AI analysis: summary, key points, sentiment, topics, and more.

🎬 Video Generation Prompts Sora · Kling · Veo

Generate optimised video prompts for AI video tools (Sora, Kling, Pika, Veo 3). Copy and paste into your preferred platform.

🐛 Autonomous Debugger Groq Loop

Paste buggy code + error message. The debugger autonomously identifies root cause, proposes fixes, and verifies the solution.

🔒 Security Auditor OWASP · CVSS

Audit code for security vulnerabilities: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, insecure dependencies, exposed secrets, and more.

🧪 Auto Test Generator

Paste a function or class and get complete unit tests with edge cases, happy paths, and error scenarios.

👁️ Code Reviewer Senior Dev AI

Full code review: correctness, performance, readability, best practices, naming, complexity, and refactored suggestions.

🔄 Code Translator Any Language ↔ Any
💡 Code Explainer
🗄️ Database Query Builder SQL · NoSQL · ORM

Describe the API and what you need — get ready-to-use integration code, error handling, auth, and retry logic.

⚙️ DevOps Assistant CI/CD · Docker · Cloud
🐙 GitHub Agent PRs · Issues · Diffs
Free at github.com/settings/tokens — 5,000 req/hour unauthenticated
🕷️ Web Scraper

Extract content from any public URL via free fetch proxy + AI-powered parsing. For heavy-duty scraping with anti-bot bypass & JS rendering, upgrade to ScraperAPI or Firecrawl ($29+/mo).

⚠️ Only scrape pages you have permission to access. Respect robots.txt and terms of service.
AI Summary & Analysis of extracted content
Use ScraperAPI (paste key below for JS-rendered pages)
📊 Market Real-Time Data

Live stock prices, options chains, crypto tickers, and market indices. Free tier uses Alpha Vantage (delayed). For true real-time, live options & institutional data upgrade to Polygon.io or Bloomberg ($29+/mo).

Include AI market commentary & trade signals
ℹ️ Live options chains require Polygon.io ($29/mo). The free tier shows simulated options data & AI greeks analysis.
🛰️ Satellite & Maps Pro

Geocoding, routing, satellite tile maps & area analysis via OpenStreetMap (free). For high-res satellite imagery, advanced routing & Places API upgrade to Google Maps API ($200 free credit/mo then billed).

Show interactive map preview
⚖️ Legal Database Search
⚠️ Not Legal Advice: This tool provides legal research assistance only. Always consult a qualified lawyer before making legal decisions.

Search case law, statutes, legal filings & precedents. Free tier uses AI + public sources. For premium access to full Westlaw/LexisNexis databases see the links below.

🇳🇬 NJC Nigeria
Nigerian judiciary decisions 🇬🇧 BAILII
UK & Ireland free case law 🇺🇸 Caselaw Access
6.7M US court opinions free 🇪🇺 EUR-Lex
EU law & legislation free 🌍 WorldLII
Global free legal databases 🌐 Singapore AG
Singapore statute database
Premium: Westlaw · LexisNexis · CourtListener (Free)
☁️ Cloud Code Execution

Run code in the cloud via free Piston API (20+ languages, light scripts). For GPU workloads, long-running jobs & heavy compute see AWS Lambda / GCP Cloud Run / Azure Functions.

☁️ AWS SageMaker
ML training & GPU notebooks 🔵 GCP Vertex AI

Free GPU T4 notebooks 🏆 Kaggle Notebooks

Studios with free GPU hours 🔷 Modal
Serverless GPU functions 🔁 Replicate
